doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 governs multijurisdictional practice with different subsections; this text invents definitions and paralegal-supervision provisions not present in the real rule.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual text of ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice with subsections on temporary practice and in-house counsel, not these invented definitions and paralegal-supervision provisions.
response_turn2:
